name: Stressed
description: Worn down in body or spirit. No immediate penalty, but while Stressed you cannot heal or recover anything else. Clear it first at camp by burning a charged Bond (or with certain talents/items).

name: Staggered
description: Off balance and winded — you've absorbed a free hit. No immediate penalty. Clears automatically during camp recovery (unless you are Stressed).

name: Injured
description: Badly hurt and in mortal danger: the next Wound you take must put you at Death's Door. Burn a charged Bond at camp to clear it before healing anything else.

name: Death's Door
description: Unconscious and helpless. You linger for one watch — if no one heals you in time (a poultice and a Wands test, or any Heal effect), you die. Being healed wakes you, marks you Stressed, and clears this condition.
